title: Business and finance news from Guardian US | The Guardian
summary: Business Business Business ‘I don’t want to waste the gas’: Uber and Lyft drivers reeling as fuel prices soarDrivers face dilemma of driving more or cutting back – and support from ride-share giants decried as ‘slap in the face’Trump energy secretary says gas prices might not drop back under $3 a gallon until 2027Traders placed over $1bn in perfectly timed bets on the Iran war. What is going on
